issuesResolved.description: Duplicate card hover zoom styles in DynamicContentCarousel.css
issuesResolved.verification: DynamicContentCarousel.css now contains only 4 lines (comment + equal-height rule). Block-scoped card hover zoom styles removed. Compiled CSS has only ONE instance of .card-post:hover img rule (the generic one from body.css).
Block-scoped @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block removed. Theme-wide blanket rule in body.css now handles all transitions/animations.

fixesApplied: File now contains ONLY the equal-height card chain rule as specified in planning spec
Rebuilt theme successfully (bun run build passes)

blockCssFile.verification: File contains ONLY the equal-height rule. No card hover zoom styles. No prefers-reduced-motion overrides. Matches planning spec requirement exactly.

cardHoverZoomRule.note: Only ONE instance of .card-post:hover img rule found (generic version from body.css). Block-scoped duplicate successfully removed.

blockScopedCardRules.note: Zero instances of .dynamic-content-carousel .card-post img found. All block-scoped card styles removed.

verification.equalHeightLayout: Working - cards stretch to fill swiper slides
verification.navigation: Present on 8 carousels (2 have navigation disabled)
verification.pagination: Present on 8 carousels (2 have pagination disabled)

cardHoverZoom.test: Card image hover zoom still works after removing block-scoped styles
cardHoverZoom.note: Generic .card-post img hover styles from body.css apply correctly to cards within carousel

carouselNavigation.note: Next/prev buttons work, slides advance/retreat correctly

planningSpec.requirement: DynamicContentCarousel.css should contain ONLY the equal-height card chain rule (.dynamic-content-carousel .swiper-slide > * { height: 100%; }). Card hover zoom and reduced-motion rules should be handled by generic styles in body.css.
planningSpec.compliance: FULL COMPLIANCE - Block CSS file contains only the equal-height rule. No duplication.

public/css/screen.css.cssSize: Reduced by removing duplicate card hover zoom styles

designDecisions.verification: Generic .card-post img and .card-team-member img styles in body.css automatically apply to all cards theme-wide, including those in DynamicContentCarousel
Theme-wide blanket rule in body.css disables all animations/transitions when user preference is set. No block-specific overrides needed.

designDecisions.decision: Create block-specific CSS file following Archive pattern
designDecisions.verification: DynamicContentCarousel.css exists and contains only truly block-specific styles (equal-height rule). Webpack auto-bundles via glob.sync('./blocks/**/*.css').

productionReadiness.notes: CSS refactoring successfully completed. All planning spec requirements met. No functional or visual regressions. Production-ready.

screenshots.name: dynamic-content-carousel-card-hover-fixed-1440w.png
screenshots.purpose: Verify card hover zoom works after removing block-scoped styles
screenshots.result: PASS - hover zoom applies correctly via generic body.css styles
